name: go2-rc
description: Remote-control the Unitree Go2 EDU: a 3-service app group (motion API + camera stream + teleop web UI) that lets you drive the dog and watch its camera from a browser.

variables.name: RC_PORT
variables.description: Port for the teleop web UI — open http://<device>:<port> in a browser to drive the dog

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: The Go2 controller's IP (where the camera/WebRTC connects TO). Usually 192.168.123.161.

variables.name: GO2_DDS_ADDRESS
variables.description: This device's OWN IP on the robot network — the address DDS binds to so the Go2 can talk back. On the Go2's onboard Jetson it's usually 192.168.123.18. (Must be on the same subnet as the controller; binding by IP avoids eth0/eth1 multi-homing issues.)
variables.prompt: This device's IP on the Go2 network
